name: Party-Perfect Garlic Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the instant granulated garlic, parsley, and chives with 1/4 cup water.
2. Combine curry, mustard, cayenne, salt, pepper, and lemon rinds in a bowl.
3. Gradually add olive oil and white vinegar while beating the mixture until well combined.
4. Chill the dressing for at least 30 minutes before serving.
5. Give the dressing a gentle shake before using to ensure all ingredients are well mixed.
Makes about 1 gallon.
